title: lastrea furcata
intro: Lastrea furcata, also known as the forked fern, is a species of fern native to Asia and the Himalayas. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. The leaves of Lastrea furcata can be prepared in various herbal preparations, such as infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
